name: Stripe MCP
description: Full Stripe API access — payments, invoices, subscriptions, and customer management for AI agents.
longDescription:
The Stripe MCP server provides comprehensive access to the Stripe API, enabling AI agents to process payments, create and manage subscriptions, generate invoices, handle refunds, and manage customer data. Built for production use with proper error handling, idempotency support, and PCI compliance considerations.

## Key Capabilities
- Create and process payments (one-time and recurring)
- Manage subscriptions and billing cycles
- Generate and send invoices
- Handle refunds and disputes
- Customer CRUD operations
- Webhook event processing
- Connect account management

## Security
- API keys are never exposed to the AI model
- All operations use scoped permissions
- PCI-compliant data handling

name: Shopify MCP
description: Manage your Shopify store — products, orders, inventory, and customers through AI agents.
longDescription:
The Shopify MCP server connects your AI agents to Shopify's Admin API, enabling full store management capabilities. Create products, process orders, track inventory, manage customers, and handle fulfillment — all through natural language commands.

## Key Capabilities
- Product CRUD with variants and images
- Order management and fulfillment
- Inventory tracking across locations
- Customer management and segmentation
- Discount and promotion creation
- Analytics and reporting

name: PayPal MCP
description: PayPal checkout, invoicing, and payment processing for AI-powered workflows.
longDescription:
Integrate PayPal payment processing into your AI agent workflows. Handle checkouts, send invoices, process refunds, and manage disputes — all through the MCP protocol.

## Key Capabilities
- Create and capture payments
- Send professional invoices
- Process refunds
- Manage disputes and chargebacks
- Payout to sellers and partners

name: Square MCP
description: Square payments, POS integration, and business management tools for AI agents.
longDescription:
Connect your AI agents to Square's ecosystem for payment processing, point-of-sale operations, inventory management, and customer engagement.

## Key Capabilities
- Process in-person and online payments
- Manage catalog and inventory
- Customer directory and loyalty programs
- Team management
- Reporting and analytics

name: Slack MCP
description: Send messages, manage channels, and automate Slack workflows from your AI agents.
longDescription:
The Slack MCP server gives your AI agents full access to Slack workspaces. Post messages, create channels, manage users, set up automated workflows, and react to events in real-time.

## Key Capabilities
- Send and read messages in channels and DMs
- Create and manage channels
- User and group management
- File uploads and sharing
- Workflow builder integration
- Slash command handling
- Event subscription and real-time updates

name: Gmail MCP
description: Read, compose, send, and manage email through Gmail — AI-powered email automation.
longDescription:
Give your AI agents the ability to manage email through Gmail. Read incoming messages, compose and send emails, manage labels, search through mail, and handle attachments.

## Key Capabilities
- Read and search emails
- Compose and send messages
- Reply and forward
- Label and organize
- Attachment handling
- Draft management
- Thread operations

name: Discord MCP
description: Manage Discord servers, send messages, moderate communities, and automate bot actions.
longDescription:
The Discord MCP server enables AI agents to interact with Discord servers. Send messages, manage channels, moderate users, create events, and build automated community management workflows.

## Key Capabilities
- Send and manage messages
- Channel and category management
- User moderation (kick, ban, timeout)
- Role management
- Event creation
- Voice channel operations

name: Twilio MCP
description: SMS, voice calls, WhatsApp messaging, and communication APIs for AI agents.
longDescription:
Integrate Twilio's communication platform with your AI agents. Send SMS messages, make voice calls, connect via WhatsApp, and manage phone numbers.

## Key Capabilities
- Send and receive SMS
- Make and manage voice calls
- WhatsApp messaging
- Phone number management
- Call recording and transcription
- Programmable messaging

name: SendGrid MCP
description: Transactional and marketing email at scale — templates, campaigns, and deliverability.
longDescription:
Send transactional emails, manage marketing campaigns, handle email templates, and track deliverability through AI agents connected to SendGrid.

## Key Capabilities
- Send transactional emails
- Marketing campaign management
- Template creation and management
- Contact list management
- Deliverability analytics
- Bounce and spam management

name: PostgreSQL MCP
description: Query, manage, and automate PostgreSQL databases with natural language through AI agents.
longDescription:
Connect your AI agents directly to PostgreSQL databases. Execute queries, manage schemas, handle migrations, monitor performance, and automate database operations.

## Key Capabilities
- Execute SQL queries (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
- Schema management and migrations
- Table and index operations
- Performance monitoring and query optimization
- Backup and restore operations
- Connection pool management

## Security
- Read-only mode available
- Query parameterization to prevent injection
- Role-based access control

name: Supabase MCP
description: Full Supabase backend access — database, auth, storage, and edge functions from AI agents.
longDescription:
The Supabase MCP server provides complete access to Supabase projects. Manage your database, handle authentication, upload files to storage, and invoke edge functions.

## Key Capabilities
- Database operations (CRUD, RPC, realtime)
- Authentication management
- Storage file operations
- Edge function invocation
- Row-level security management
- Realtime subscriptions

name: MongoDB MCP
description: Document database operations — CRUD, aggregation, indexing for MongoDB through AI agents.
longDescription:
Connect your AI agents to MongoDB for document database operations. Insert, query, update, and delete documents, run aggregation pipelines, manage indexes, and monitor performance.

## Key Capabilities
- CRUD operations on documents
- Aggregation pipeline execution
- Index management
- Collection operations
- Change streams
- Atlas search integration

name: Redis MCP
description: In-memory data store operations — caching, pub/sub, queues, and key-value operations.
longDescription:
Use Redis through your AI agents for caching, message queuing, real-time data processing, and key-value operations.

## Key Capabilities
- Key-value operations (GET, SET, DEL)
- Hash, list, set, and sorted set operations
- Pub/sub messaging
- Stream processing
- Cache management with TTL
- Lua script execution

name: GitHub MCP
description: Full GitHub access — repos, issues, pull requests, actions, and code search for AI agents.
longDescription:
The GitHub MCP server provides comprehensive access to GitHub's platform. Manage repositories, create and review pull requests, handle issues, trigger workflows, search code, and manage releases.

## Key Capabilities

- Pull request operations (create, review, merge)
- Issue tracking (create, label, assign, close)
- GitHub Actions (trigger, monitor workflows)
- Code search across repositories
- Release and tag management
- Gist operations
- Organization and team management

name: Linear MCP
description: Project management with Linear — create issues, manage sprints, and track progress via AI agents.
longDescription:
Connect your AI agents to Linear for streamlined project management. Create and update issues, manage cycles and projects, track team progress, and automate workflow transitions.

## Key Capabilities
- Issue CRUD with rich metadata
- Cycle and project management
- Team workload visibility
- Label and priority management
- Workflow state transitions
- Comment and attachment operations

name: Sentry MCP
description: Error tracking and performance monitoring — investigate and resolve issues with AI agents.

Give your AI agents access to Sentry for intelligent error tracking and performance monitoring. Query errors, analyze stack traces, investigate performance bottlenecks, and manage issue resolution.

## Key Capabilities
- Query and filter error events
- Stack trace analysis
- Performance transaction monitoring
- Issue assignment and resolution
- Release tracking
- Alert management

name: Vercel MCP

name: Docker MCP

name: Google Calendar MCP

name: Google Drive MCP
description: File management, sharing, and collaboration on Google Drive through AI agents.

- File search and filtering
- Google Docs/Sheets/Slides operations
- Trash and recovery

name: Airtable MCP
description: Spreadsheet-database hybrid — manage bases, records, and automations through AI agents.

## Key Capabilities

- Automation triggers

name: OpenAI MCP

Give your AI agents access to OpenAI's suite of models. Generate text with GPT, create images with DALL-E, transcribe audio with Whisper, and compute embeddings.

## Key Capabilities

- Image generation (DALL-E 3)
- Audio transcription (Whisper)
- Text embeddings
- Fine-tuning management
- Moderation API

name: Anthropic MCP
description: Claude API access — text generation, analysis, and conversation through the MCP protocol.
longDescription:
Connect to the Anthropic API through MCP for access to Claude models. Generate text, analyze documents, have multi-turn conversations, and leverage Claude's capabilities.

## Key Capabilities
- Text generation with Claude
- Document analysis
- Multi-turn conversations
- Tool use orchestration
- System prompt management

name: Hugging Face MCP
description: Run inference on thousands of ML models — NLP, vision, audio, and multimodal.

name: Mixpanel MCP
description: Event analytics — track user actions, build funnels, analyze retention, and segment users.
